message:
feat(desktop): add native desktop notification delivery (wa-psm.2)

Implements desktop notification delivery via native OS tools:
- macOS: osascript (Notification Center)
- Linux: notify-send (libnotify)
- Windows: PowerShell toast notifications

Auto-detects platform at runtime with graceful fallback when the tool
is unavailable. Maps severity levels to platform urgency (Info→Low,
Warning→Normal, Critical→Critical).

- DesktopNotifyConfig: enabled flag, sound toggle
- NotifyBackend: auto-detect + manual override for testing
- build_command(): platform-specific command generation
- DesktopNotifier: sends notifications with structured delivery results
- Extended NotificationConfig with desktop section
- 19 new tests (command building, escaping, config, notifier logic)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
